remarks.text: Six AI agent SDKs for enterprise Kubernetes, compared
remarks.content: There’s a question we hear constantly from platform and engineering leaders right now, “which agent SDK should we standardize on for our Kubernetes clusters?” The honest answer is that the question is slightly wrong, and... The post Six AI agent SDKs for enterprise Kubernetes, comp
remarks.contentTranslation: 我们现在经常从平台和工程领导那里听到一个问题， “我们应该为我们的Kubernetes集群标准化哪个AgentSDK ？“老实说，问题有点不对劲，而且……企业Kubernetes发布的Six AI agent SDK ，
remarks.translation: 六个用于企业Kubernetes的AIAgentSDK ，比较

Somehow Argentina is forgetting the basic strategy of World Cup games:

remarks.name: Nikunj Kothari
remarks.role: partner fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire meter, opendoor, atlassian & others. love shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
remarks.text:
I’m one of the more vocal critics of Gemini and their product experience but it’s still the only place where with a single API key you can really do it all..

> Flash - for fast cheap long context structured tasks
> Nano banana - world class images. New lite model is great. 
> Search with grounding
> Realtime - audio is really good with 3.1 flash and now with Omni for video
> and many others
 
So many side projects of mine are BYOK which can be simplified down to just bringing a Gemini key (ai dot dev ftw)
remarks.translation:
我是Gemini及其产品体验的直言不讳的批评者之一，但它仍然是唯一一个使用单个API密钥就可以真正做到这一切的地方。> Flash -用于快速便宜的长上下文结构化任务> Nano banana -世界一流的图像。新款Lite很棒。
>接地搜索>实时-音频非常好，使用3.1闪光灯，现在使用Omni进行视频>以及其他许多项目都是BYOK ，可以简化为只带双子座钥匙（ ai dot dev ftw ）
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察模型运行、算力、存储、sandbox 或开发平台基础设施的变化；后续事实判断需回到原始公告或技术文档。

remarks.name: Aaron Levie
remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
The battle in AI is shaping up to be a battle for context.

Everything in AI is about making sure that agents are effective as possible. That effectiveness comes down to whether the agent has the right domain expertise, access to the right context and tools to work with, and are involved in workflow in a way that users can easily interact with, review its work, and incorporate it into the rest of the process.

As a consequence, the platforms that are able to capture and leverage the best and most context within their agents —and be able to pick the right models for the task- will be the place where agents do their best work. You can just look at coding agents, legal agents, or support agents as examples of what this looks like at scale. 

This is why the applied AI layer has a lot more value than just being an LLM wrapper. The ability to organize the critical knowledge for the work being done, and maintain this knowledge in a governed way where only the right people and agents have access, and the ability to improve the context for agents more and more over time, is critical.

Over time, this layer will be able to route work between a variety of models, leveraging frontier intelligence for planning and orchestration and review, and a mix of lower cost models (open or closed) for the large volume of work between these tasks.

The applied layer is also in a good position to train and develop its own models as well that are purpose built for their domains. Never good to bet against the bitter lesson, but equally taking a near frontier base model and post training it for just one type of domain work can -in many cases- lower costs or deliver better performance for certain tasks. 

Finally, this applied layer is also where most of the change management of the workflow will need to occur. This is why FDEs are so important at the applied layer, because this is the point where the customer needs to have specific business problem solved by a particular vendor. Whichever companies can solve that completely in an end-to-end fashion will have the greatest moats. 
 
As each day goes on, we’re learning more about what the likely long term market dynamics will look like in AI.
remarks.translation:
AI的战斗正在成为一场争夺背景的战斗。AI中的一切都是为了确保Agent尽可能有效。这种有效性取决于客服代表是否具备合适的领域专业知识、对合适的上下文和工具的访问权限，以及是否以用户可以轻松互动、审核其工作并将其纳入其余流程的方式参与工作流。
因此，能够捕捉和利用客服代表中最佳和最多情境的平台，以及能够为任务选择正确模型的平台，将成为客服代表尽最大努力工作的地方。您可以将编码Agent商、法律Agent商或支持Agent商作为大规模示例。这就是为什么应用的AI层比仅作为LLM包装器具有更多价值的原因。
能够为正在进行的工作组织关键知识，并以受管控的方式维护这些知识，只有合适的人员和客服代表才能访问这些知识，并且能够随着时间的推移越来越多地改善客服代表的背景，这一点至关重要。
随着时间的推移，该层将能够在各种模型之间路由工作，利用前沿智能进行规划、编排和审查，并为这些任务之间的大量工作混合使用低成本模型（开放或封闭）。应用层也非常适合训练和开发自己的模型，这些模型是为其领域专门构建的。
与痛苦的教训打赌从来都不好，但同样地，采用近边缘基础模型并对其进行后期训练，仅用于一种类型的领域工作，在许多情况下，可以降低成本或为某些任务提供更好的性能。最后，这个应用层也是工作流的大多数变更管理需要发生的地方。
这就是为什么FDE在应用层如此重要的原因，因为这是客户需要由特定供应商解决特定业务问题的地方。无论哪家公司能够以端到端的方式完全解决这个问题，都将拥有最大的护城河。随着时间的推移，我们正在更多地了解AI可能带来的长期市场动态。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Guillermo Rauch
remarks.role: vercel CEO
remarks.text:
Agentic self-improvement. 

Give your agent the ability to introspect its past runs, spot inefficiencies, errors, redundant tool calls, and produce new prompts and skills.

That’s why agent observability is built-in when you deploy https://t.co/99eEa13mZ3 to Vercel. https://t.co/ksJ3Mzzi7R
remarks.translation: Agent自我提升。让您的Agent能够反思其过去的运行，发现效率低下、错误、冗余的工具调用，并产生新的提示和技能。这就是为什么当您部署到Vercel时，Agent可观察性是内置的。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。
